notableEvents.label: Victor Caratini plunked
notableEvents.detail: Victor Caratini hit by pitch. Kody Clemens to 3rd. Luke Keaschall to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Kody Clemens doubles (10) on a sharp fly ball to left fielder Jackson Chourio. Ryan Jeffers scores. Kody Clemens scores. Throwing error by shortstop Joey Ortiz.

notableEvents.label: Trevor Larnach pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Larnach grounds out, second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Andrew Vaughn.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
